title: Xtra Crisp Northern Irish Beef Braise
description: A spicy and crispy solo dinner dish from Northern Ireland featuring chives and a rich braise, this recipe is perfect for a weeknight meal and is nut-free-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the tomato paste, beef broth, brown sugar, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Return the beef to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the beef for 2.5 hours, or until tender and crispy on the outside.
Stir in the chopped chives and serve hot.
